cables: Potential copper recovery. Value depends on copper content, insulation, and contamination.
circuit_boards: Potential precious and base metal recovery, including copper, gold, silver, palladium, and tin.
smartphones: Mixed recovery stream with battery, aluminum, copper, glass, plastics, and small precious-metal-bearing boards.
ram: Higher-value board category with gold-plated contacts and recoverable copper-bearing circuitry.
